coreIssue: This junior Product Designer 1:1 is mainly about whether Kenji has enough role clarity and support to navigate shifting requirements three months in.
openingQuestion: What feels hardest to navigate in your work right now when requirements shift and you are trying to figure out what good looks like?
listenFor: whether he names a specific project or recent change where expectations became unclear
whether if they describe asking for help, they mention a person, channel, or moment they held back
whether he pauses or stays vague when you ask what support from the team setup would make the work easier
avoid: do not turn this exploratory check-in into a judgement about resilience or fit
do not rush to explain team processes before hearing where a junior designer is getting stuck
goodOutcome: You and Kenji have agreed one concrete way to make success more visible for a junior Product Designer in the next few weeks, plus one support point he can use earlier when requirements move.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where requirements shifted for Kenji so you can ground the conversation in a real moment without making it corrective.
